name: Stuffed Acorn Squash
recipeIngredient: 1 Tablespoon maple syrup or flavored syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Cut each acorn squash lengthwise in half; discard seeds.
3. Place squash halves, cut side down, in a 12 x 8-inch baking dish; bake for 45 minutes.
4. Meanwhile, prepare rice according to package directions.
5. In a 10-inch skillet over medium heat, cook pork-sausage meat until browned. Remove meat (discard drippings) to a medium bowl; toss with egg, mushrooms, syrup and cooked brown rice.
6. Turn the squash halves, cut side up, in the baking dish; sprinkle the squash with salt.
7. Spoon the meat mixture into the squash halves.
8. Cover with foil and bake for 15 minutes or until tender. Transfer to warm platter and serve.
